chunks.title: The Fate of All
chunks.reason: Describes the common destiny of righteous and wicked under God's hand.

chunks.title: Enjoy Life Before Death
chunks.reason: Calls for joy in daily life and labor before going to Sheol.

chunks.title: Time and Chance
chunks.reason: Explains that outcomes depend on unforeseen time and misfortune.

chunks.title: The Poor Wise Man
chunks.reason: Tells a story of a wise man saving a city yet being forgotten.

chunks.title: Value of Wisdom
chunks.reason: Concludes that wisdom is superior to strength and weapons.
